desc.de: Audit-Service für alle AWS API-Aufrufe. Management Events, Data Events (S3/Lambda/DynamoDB), Insights Events (Anomalie-Erkennung), CloudTrail Lake (SQL-Queries), Organization Trails, Multi-Region.
desc.en: Audit service for all AWS API calls. Management events, data events (S3/Lambda/DynamoDB), Insights Events (anomaly detection), CloudTrail Lake (SQL queries), Organization Trails, multi-region.

otcDesc.de: Audit-Trail für OTC API-Operationen (Management Events). Traces werden 7 Tage in der Konsole vorgehalten. Transfer nach OBS (Langzeitarchivierung) und LTS (Suche/Analyse) möglich. Key Event Notifications über SMN (bis 200 Regeln, Filter auf Service/User/Resource). Kein Data Event Logging (kein OBS Object-Level/FGS Invocation Logging). Ein Tracker pro Region.
otcDesc.en: Audit trail for OTC API operations (management events). Traces retained 7 days in console. Transfer to OBS (long-term archival) and LTS (search/analysis) possible. Key event notifications via SMN (up to 200 rules, filter on service/user/resource). No data event logging (no OBS object-level/FGS invocation logging). One tracker per region.

migration.de: **Regionale Tracker.** Kein Multi-Region Trail — pro Region einen separaten Tracker konfigurieren. **Nur Management Events.** Data Events (OBS Object-Level, FGS Invocations) werden nicht unterstützt — diese Zugriffe erscheinen nicht in CTS. **Log-Analyse.** CloudTrail Lake (SQL-Queries) hat kein Pendant. Traces an LTS weiterleiten und dort mit Suchfunktion analysieren. **Retention.** Traces nur 7 Tage in der Console — für Compliance OBS-Transfer aktivieren. **Nicht verfügbar.** Organization Trail (Multi-Account-Audit), Insights Events (automatische API-Anomalie-Erkennung). **Benachrichtigungen.** Key Event Notifications über SMN (bis 200 Regeln, filterbar nach Service/User/Resource).
migration.en: **Regional Trackers.** No multi-region trail — configure a separate tracker per region. **Management Events Only.** Data events (OBS object-level, FGS invocations) are not supported — these accesses don't appear in CTS. **Log Analysis.** CloudTrail Lake (SQL queries) has no equivalent. Forward traces to LTS and analyze with its search function. **Retention.** Traces retained only 7 days in console — enable OBS transfer for compliance. **Not Available.** Organization Trail (multi-account audit), Insights Events (automatic API anomaly detection). **Notifications.** Key event notifications via SMN (up to 200 rules, filterable by service/user/resource).

equivNote.de: Management Events gut abgedeckt. Kein Data Event Logging (S3 Object-Level, Lambda Invocation). Kein CloudTrail Insights (automatische Anomalie-Erkennung), keine Organization Trails, kein CloudTrail Lake (SQL-Abfragen). Traces 7 Tage in Console, danach OBS/LTS nötig.
equivNote.en: Management events well covered. No data event logging (S3 object-level, Lambda invocation). No CloudTrail Insights (automatic anomaly detection), no Organization Trails, no CloudTrail Lake (SQL queries). Traces 7 days in console, then OBS/LTS needed.

desc.de: ML-basierte Anomalie-Erkennung für Operations. Analysiert CloudWatch Metriken, CloudTrail Events und Config Changes. Proactive/Reactive Insights, automatische Empfehlungen, SNS-Notifications.
desc.en: ML-based anomaly detection for operations. Analyzes CloudWatch metrics, CloudTrail events, and Config changes. Proactive/reactive insights, automatic recommendations, SNS notifications.

otcDesc.de: Kein ML-basierter DevOps Insights Service auf OTC. AOM bietet Basis-Monitoring und Alarm-Korrelation, aber keine ML-gestützte Anomalie-Erkennung oder automatische Root-Cause-Analyse.
otcDesc.en: No ML-based DevOps insights service on OTC. AOM provides basic monitoring and alarm correlation, but no ML-powered anomaly detection or automatic root-cause analysis.

migration.de: **Kein OTC-Pendant.** ML-basierte Operations Insights existieren auf OTC nicht. **Metriken-Monitoring.** Prometheus + Grafana auf CCE mit Alertmanager für Anomalie-Erkennung, oder Cloud Eye Alarme + AOM für Basis-Monitoring. **Log-Analyse.** ELK Stack oder Grafana Loki auf CCE für log-basierte Anomalie-Erkennung. **Full-Stack APM.** Externe Lösungen (Datadog, New Relic, Dynatrace) für End-to-End-Observability. **Proactive Insights.** Cloud Eye + FunctionGraph für threshold-basierte Vorhersagen. **Reactive Insights.** CTS + LTS Log-Analyse mit manueller Korrelation — kein automatisches Root-Cause-Mapping über Service-Grenzen.
migration.en: **No OTC Equivalent.** ML-based operations insights don't exist on OTC. **Metrics Monitoring.** Prometheus + Grafana on CCE with Alertmanager for anomaly detection, or Cloud Eye alarms + AOM for basic monitoring. **Log Analysis.** ELK Stack or Grafana Loki on CCE for log-based anomaly detection. **Full-Stack APM.** External solutions (Datadog, New Relic, Dynatrace) for end-to-end observability. **Proactive Insights.** Cloud Eye + FunctionGraph for threshold-based predictions. **Reactive Insights.** CTS + LTS log analysis with manual correlation — no automatic root-cause mapping across service boundaries.

desc.de: Configuration Tracking & Compliance-Auditing. 300+ Managed Rules, Custom Rules (Lambda/Guard), Conformance Packs, Config Aggregator (Multi-Account), Remediation Actions, Advanced Queries (SQL), Resource Timeline.
desc.en: Configuration tracking & compliance auditing. 300+ managed rules, custom rules (Lambda/Guard), conformance packs, Config Aggregator (multi-account), remediation actions, advanced queries (SQL), resource timeline.

otcDesc.de: Resource Recorder (Snapshots alle 24h, Change Notifications alle 6h nach OBS/SMN). Built-in Compliance Rules (~80 vordefinierte Regeln) und Custom Policies. Advanced Queries mit ResourceQL (SQL-ähnlich, Abfrage über Resource-Inventar). Resource-Beziehungen und Change Records. SMN-Benachrichtigungen bei Änderungen. Kein Multi-Account Aggregator, keine Conformance Packs.
otcDesc.en: Resource Recorder (snapshots every 24h, change notifications every 6h to OBS/SMN). Built-in compliance rules (~80 predefined rules) and custom policies. Advanced queries with ResourceQL (SQL-like, query across resource inventory). Resource relationships and change records. SMN notifications on changes. No multi-account aggregator, no conformance packs.

migration.de: **Compliance-Regeln.** ~80 Built-in Rules (AWS hat 300+). Custom Policies über JSON-Templates — nicht Lambda-basiert wie AWS Custom Rules. Guard-Regeln (Policy-as-Code) nicht unterstützt. **Conformance Packs.** Kein Pendant — einzelne Rules manuell zusammenstellen. **Resource Timeline.** Snapshots alle 24h, Change Notifications alle 6h — deutlich weniger granular als AWS Config (near-realtime). **ResourceQL.** SQL-ähnliche Abfragen über alle aufgezeichneten Ressourcen (vergleichbar mit AWS Config Advanced Query). **Remediation.** Kein SSM Automation Backend — nur SMN-Benachrichtigungen, keine automatische Korrektur. **Nicht verfügbar.** Config Aggregator (Multi-Account), Conformance Packs, Guard-Regeln.
migration.en: **Compliance Rules.** ~80 built-in rules (AWS has 300+). Custom policies via JSON templates — not Lambda-based like AWS Custom Rules. Guard rules (policy-as-code) not supported. **Conformance Packs.** No equivalent — assemble individual rules manually. **Resource Timeline.** Snapshots every 24h, change notifications every 6h — significantly less granular than AWS Config (near-realtime). **ResourceQL.** SQL-like queries across all recorded resources (comparable to AWS Config Advanced Query). **Remediation.** No SSM Automation backend — only SMN notifications, no automatic correction. **Not Available.** Config Aggregator (multi-account), Conformance Packs, Guard rules.

equivNote.de: ~80 Built-in Rules (ca. 25% der AWS 300+ Managed Rules). Custom Policies über JSON-Templates. ResourceQL für SQL-ähnliche Abfragen über Resource-Inventar. Kein Multi-Account Config Aggregator. Keine Conformance Packs (Rule-Bundles). Remediation Actions eingeschränkt (kein SSM Automation). Resource Timeline weniger detailliert (Snapshots alle 24h).
equivNote.en: ~80 built-in rules (approx. 25% of AWS 300+ managed rules). Custom policies via JSON templates. ResourceQL for SQL-like queries across resource inventory. No multi-account Config Aggregator. No conformance packs (rule bundles). Remediation actions limited (no SSM Automation). Resource timeline less detailed (snapshots every 24h).

tfNote.de: Resource Recorder und Policy Assignments per TF steuerbar, aber Custom Policies und Compliance-Regeln nicht vollständig per TF konfigurierbar.
tfNote.en: Resource recorder and policy assignments manageable via TF, but custom policies and compliance rules not fully configurable via TF.

desc.de: Zentrale Plattform für operatives Management. Session Manager (Shell ohne SSH), Parameter Store, Patch Manager, Run Command, State Manager, Inventory, Automation, Maintenance Windows, OpsCenter.
desc.en: Central platform for operational management. Session Manager (shell without SSH), Parameter Store, Patch Manager, Run Command, State Manager, Inventory, Automation, maintenance windows, OpsCenter.

otcDesc.de: AOM ist eine O&M-Plattform für Application- und Host-Monitoring: Metriken (CPU, Memory, Disk, Network), Log-Suche (LTS-Integration), Auto-Discovery (Prozesse, Container), Alarm Management, Dashboards. Kein Parameter Store, Session Manager, Patch Manager, Run Command oder Inventory. AOM fokussiert auf Monitoring, nicht auf operatives Management.
otcDesc.en: AOM is an O&M platform for application and host monitoring: metrics (CPU, memory, disk, network), log search (LTS integration), auto-discovery (processes, containers), alarm management, dashboards. No Parameter Store, Session Manager, Patch Manager, Run Command, or Inventory. AOM focuses on monitoring, not operational management.

migration.de: **Kein Gesamtpendant.** SSM ist ein Sammeldienst — auf OTC auf viele Tools verteilt. **Secrets & Config.** Parameter Store → CSMS (ab 05/2026) für Secrets, OBS oder Vault für Key-Value-Konfigurationen. **Shell-Zugriff.** Session Manager hat kein Pendant — SSH über Bastion Host oder VNC über Console nutzen (kein agentless Shell-Zugriff). **Patch & Run Command.** Patch Manager → Ansible Playbooks oder manuell. Run Command → Ansible ad-hoc oder Salt. **Inventory & State.** Inventory → OTC Config Service (Resource Recorder). State Manager → Ansible Playbooks mit Cron. **Automation.** Runbooks → Ansible/Terraform Pipelines. Maintenance Windows → eigene Scheduling-Lösung. OpsCenter → AOM Alarme + LTS Logs mit manueller Korrelation.
migration.en: **No Combined Equivalent.** SSM is a collection service — distributed across many tools on OTC. **Secrets & Config.** Parameter Store → CSMS (from 05/2026) for secrets, OBS or Vault for key-value configurations. **Shell Access.** Session Manager has no equivalent — use SSH via Bastion Host or VNC via Console (no agentless shell access). **Patch & Run Command.** Patch Manager → Ansible playbooks or manual. Run Command → Ansible ad-hoc or Salt. **Inventory & State.** Inventory → OTC Config Service (Resource Recorder). State Manager → Ansible Playbooks with cron. **Automation.** Runbooks → Ansible/Terraform pipelines. Maintenance Windows → custom scheduling solution. OpsCenter → AOM alarms + LTS logs with manual correlation.

equivNote.de: AOM fokussiert auf Monitoring/Logs/Alarme — deckt nur den CloudWatch-ähnlichen Teil von SSM ab. Kein Parameter Store (→ CSMS ab 05/2026 oder Vault), kein Session Manager (→ SSH/VNC), kein Patch Manager (→ Ansible), kein Run Command (→ Ansible/Salt), kein Inventory (→ Config Service), kein State Manager, kein Automation, keine Maintenance Windows.
equivNote.en: AOM focuses on monitoring/logs/alarms — covers only the CloudWatch-like part of SSM. No Parameter Store (→ CSMS from 05/2026 or Vault), no Session Manager (→ SSH/VNC), no Patch Manager (→ Ansible), no Run Command (→ Ansible/Salt), no Inventory (→ Config Service), no State Manager, no Automation, no maintenance windows.

desc.de: Infrastructure as Code. Deklarative Templates (JSON/YAML) für AWS-Ressourcen. Stack-Management, Drift Detection, Change Sets.
desc.en: Infrastructure as Code. Declarative templates (JSON/YAML) for AWS resources. Stack management, drift detection, change sets.

otcDesc.de: Heat-basierter IaC-Service. HOT-Templates (YAML) für OTC-Ressourcen. Stack Lifecycle Management. Nicht CloudFormation-kompatibel!
otcDesc.en: Heat-based IaC service. HOT templates (YAML) for OTC resources. Stack lifecycle management. Not CloudFormation-compatible!

migration.de: **Template-Format.** RTS nutzt HOT (Heat Orchestration Template) — NICHT CloudFormation-kompatibel. Templates müssen komplett umgeschrieben werden. **Terraform empfohlen.** opentelekomcloud Provider ist die bessere Wahl für OTC als RTS. **Resource-Abdeckung.** RTS hat deutlich weniger Resource Types als CloudFormation. **Change Sets & Drift.** Change Sets → RTS Preview. Stack Drift Detection eingeschränkt. **Nested Stacks.** Funktionieren anders als in CloudFormation. **Nicht verfügbar.** StackSets (Multi-Account/Region), Macros, Transforms. **Terraform-Hinweis.** Resource heißt opentelekomcloud_rts_stack_v1, NICHT rfs_stack_v1.
migration.en: **Template Format.** RTS uses HOT (Heat Orchestration Template) — NOT CloudFormation-compatible. Templates must be completely rewritten. **Terraform Recommended.** opentelekomcloud provider is the better choice for OTC than RTS. **Resource Coverage.** RTS has significantly fewer resource types than CloudFormation. **Change Sets & Drift.** Change Sets → RTS Preview. Stack Drift Detection limited. **Nested Stacks.** Work differently than in CloudFormation. **Not Available.** StackSets (multi-account/region), Macros, Transforms. **Terraform Note.** Resource is opentelekomcloud_rts_stack_v1, NOT rfs_stack_v1.

equivNote.de: RTS ist Heat-basiert, nicht CloudFormation-kompatibel. Deutlich weniger Resource-Typen, kein StackSets, kein Drift Detection, keine Macros/Transforms.
equivNote.en: RTS is Heat-based, not CloudFormation-compatible. Significantly fewer resource types, no StackSets, no drift detection, no macros/transforms.

tfNote.de: RTS Stack-Erstellung per TF möglich, aber Templates selbst sind HOT-Format (nicht TF-nativ).
tfNote.en: RTS stack creation possible via TF, but templates themselves are HOT format (not TF-native).

desc.de: CI/CD Pipeline-Orchestrierung. Source (CodeCommit/GitHub), Build (CodeBuild), Deploy (CodeDeploy), Approval Gates.
desc.en: CI/CD pipeline orchestration. Source (CodeCommit/GitHub), build (CodeBuild), deploy (CodeDeploy), approval gates.

otcDesc.de: OTC bietet keinen Managed CI/CD Pipeline Service. Kein Build- oder Deployment-Service.
otcDesc.en: OTC offers no managed CI/CD pipeline service. No build or deployment service.

alt.de: GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Tekton auf CCE
alt.en: GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Tekton on CCE

migration.de: **Kein Managed CI/CD.** OTC bietet keinen Pipeline-Service. **Build & Deploy.** Jenkins auf CCE (Helm), GitLab CI (self-hosted auf ECS), GitHub Actions (extern) oder Tekton auf CCE als Alternativen. CodeBuild → Jenkins/GitLab Runner. CodeDeploy → ArgoCD (Kubernetes) oder Ansible. **Source Control.** CodeCommit → eigener Git-Server oder extern (GitHub/GitLab). **Artefakte & Credentials.** Pipeline-Artefakte in OBS statt S3. IAM Roles für Pipeline-Stages → Service Accounts + CSMS für Credentials.
migration.en: **No Managed CI/CD.** OTC offers no pipeline service. **Build & Deploy.** Jenkins on CCE (Helm), GitLab CI (self-hosted on ECS), GitHub Actions (external), or Tekton on CCE as alternatives. CodeBuild → Jenkins/GitLab Runner. CodeDeploy → ArgoCD (Kubernetes) or Ansible. **Source Control.** CodeCommit → own Git server or external (GitHub/GitLab). **Artifacts & Credentials.** Pipeline artifacts in OBS instead of S3. IAM Roles for pipeline stages → Service Accounts + CSMS for credentials.

desc.de: Database Migration Service. Homogene und heterogene DB-Migrationen. Schema Conversion, CDC (Change Data Capture), Serverless.
desc.en: Database Migration Service. Homogeneous and heterogeneous DB migrations. Schema Conversion, CDC (Change Data Capture), serverless.

otcDesc.de: DB-Migration und Replikation. Online-Migration, Offline-Migration, Synchronisation, Disaster Recovery. MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Oracle, SQL Server. Schema-Vergleich und -Konvertierung.
otcDesc.en: DB migration and replication. Online migration, offline migration, synchronization, disaster recovery. MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Oracle, SQL Server. Schema comparison and conversion.

alt.de: pgloader, mysqldump/mysqlpump, mongodump/mongorestore, Debezium auf CCE
alt.en: pgloader, mysqldump/mysqlpump, mongodump/mongorestore, Debezium on CCE

migration.de: **Online-Migration.** DRS unterstützt CDC-basierte Online-Migration ähnlich wie DMS. Transformationsoptionen sind jedoch eingeschränkter. **Heterogene Migrationen.** Oracle→PostgreSQL und ähnliche Cross-Engine-Szenarien sind limitierter als bei DMS. **Schema-Konvertierung.** DRS hat eigenen Schema-Vergleich, aber weniger automatisiert als DMS Schema Conversion Tool. **Task-Konfiguration.** DMS Serverless existiert nicht — DRS erfordert explizite Task-Konfiguration mit anderen Parametern als DMS. **Zusätzliche Pfade.** DRS unterstützt laut Roadmap Cassandra→GeminiDB und DB2→GaussDB.
migration.en: **Online Migration.** DRS supports CDC-based online migration similar to DMS. However, transformation options are more limited. **Heterogeneous Migrations.** Oracle→PostgreSQL and similar cross-engine scenarios are more limited than DMS. **Schema Conversion.** DRS has its own schema comparison but less automated than DMS Schema Conversion Tool. **Task Configuration.** DMS Serverless doesn't exist — DRS requires explicit task configuration with different parameters than DMS. **Additional Paths.** DRS supports Cassandra→GeminiDB and DB2→GaussDB per roadmap.

equivNote.de: DRS deckt Online-Migration (CDC), Offline-Migration und Synchronisation ab. Weniger heterogene Engine-Kombinationen als DMS. Kein Serverless-Modus. Schema Conversion eingeschränkter. Neue Quellen laut Roadmap: Cassandra→GeminiDB, DB2→GaussDB, DynamoDB→GeminiDB.
equivNote.en: DRS covers online migration (CDC), offline migration, and synchronization. Fewer heterogeneous engine combinations than DMS. No serverless mode. Schema conversion more limited. New sources per roadmap: Cassandra→GeminiDB, DB2→GaussDB, DynamoDB→GeminiDB.

tfNote.de: Nur Task-Erstellung per TF. Endpoint-Konfiguration innerhalb des Tasks, nicht separat wie bei AWS DMS.
tfNote.en: Only task creation via TF. Endpoint configuration within the task, not separate like AWS DMS.

desc.de: Zentrales Tag-Management. Resource Groups, Tag Editor, Tag Policies (AWS Organizations). Kosten-Allokation via Tags.
desc.en: Central tag management. Resource Groups, Tag Editor, Tag Policies (AWS Organizations). Cost allocation via tags.

otcDesc.de: Zentrales Tag-Management über alle OTC-Services. Tags erstellen, zuweisen, suchen. Predefined Tags für Standardisierung. Integration mit Cloud Eye, CTS, RMS.
otcDesc.en: Central tag management across all OTC services. Create, assign, search tags. Predefined tags for standardization. Integration with Cloud Eye, CTS, RMS.

alt.de: Manuelle Tags pro Service-API, Terraform Tags in jedem Resource-Block
alt.en: Manual tags per service API, Terraform tags in each resource block

migration.de: **Tag-Verwaltung.** TMS bietet zentrale Tag-Verwaltung mit Bulk-Operationen (vergleichbar mit Tag Editor). **Predefined Tags.** Vordefinierte Tags als Standardisierungsempfehlung — aber kein Enforcement wie AWS Tag Policies über Organizations. **Resource Groups.** Kein Pendant für logische Gruppierung per Tag-Query — TMS ist reine Tag-Verwaltung. **Kosten-Allokation.** Cloud Eye + BSS unterstützen tag-basierte Auswertung, aber eingeschränkter als AWS Cost Allocation Tags. **Tag-Limits.** Service-spezifische Tag-Limits können von AWS abweichen.
migration.en: **Tag Management.** TMS provides central tag management with bulk operations (comparable to Tag Editor). **Predefined Tags.** Predefined tags as standardization recommendation — but no enforcement like AWS Tag Policies via Organizations. **Resource Groups.** No equivalent for logical grouping via tag query — TMS is pure tag management. **Cost Allocation.** Cloud Eye + BSS support tag-based analysis, but more limited than AWS Cost Allocation Tags. **Tag Limits.** Service-specific tag limits may differ from AWS.

equivNote.de: TMS bietet zentrales Tag-Management mit Predefined Tags und Bulk-Operationen. Kein Resource Groups Pendant (logische Gruppierung per Query). Keine Tag Policies (Enforcement). Kosten-Allokation via Tags begrenzt unterstützt.
equivNote.en: TMS provides central tag management with predefined tags and bulk operations. No Resource Groups equivalent (logical grouping via query). No Tag Policies (enforcement). Cost allocation via tags limited support.
